title: 3. Allergic Rhinitis: ZhengBen (1010.12) 敏感性鼻炎：正ᴀ
text:

General treatment: First prick ShaoShang (LU 11) and ShangYang (LI 1) and then treat the diseases
according to different conditions; First prick the ear tip or ear back, and then treat the diseases according
to different conditions 喉咙总治：A．少商、商阳先行点刺，再行对症治疗。
B．亦可于耳背点刺，再对症治疗
